title: blemeesd.open
description: Open or reattach a session. The envelope is backend-neutral; backend-specific knobs live under options.<backend> (see options.claude.json / options.codex.json). Only the options block matching the chosen `backend` is consulted; sibling blocks for other backends are ignored.

resume.description: If true, reattach an existing session. CC respawns with `--resume <native_id>`; Codex reuses the cached `threadId` on its next `codex-reply` tools/call.

last_seen_seq.description: Highest `seq` the client has observed. Daemon replays ring buffer entries with `seq > last_seen_seq` before resuming live stream. Omit to skip replay.

options.description: Backend-specific knobs. Exactly the block matching `backend` is interpreted; unknown keys inside that block are rejected with invalid_message.
